summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by replacing the logo background in the Header component with a deep blue gradient (linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2a6e 0%, #1a4fa8 50%, #0a3580 100%)) and a soft blue glow box-shadow, consistent with the dark cosmic theme. The logo image and text remain visible, and the change applies to both desktop and mobile views via the same component. No immutable paths were touched. All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied.
